description: Welcome to CORNER T. HOUSE at Immel Ridge! Bordering East Abbotsford this spacious rancher with basement home features 4 bedroom/3 bathroom, CORNER unit, just over 2000 sq ft of living space, private backyard access from the main floor, oversized games room with 2 bedrooms down, large 2nd parking spot and laundry on the main floor. Centrally located this home is just minutes away from all levels of school, shopping, walking trails, restaurants and amenities! Call today for more information or a private showing!
